# Warrior’s Lens

> The official portfolio of SSG Julio C. Hernandez — a U.S. Army Combat Camera and Public Affairs photographer with 13 years of military service. DVIDS-published imagery from Operation Inherent Resolve, CENTCOM coalition operations, and CONUS training, used by 50+ international publications.

## About

- **Name:** SSG Julio C. Hernandez
- **MOS:** 46S Public Affairs Mass Communication Specialist (current)
- **MOS lineage:** 31B (Military Police) → 25M (Multimedia Illustrator) → 25V (Combat Documentation / Production Specialist) → 46V (Visual Information Specialist) → 46S (current)
- **Unit:** 55th Public Affairs Company, Fort Meade, MD
- **Service:** 13 years total — 7 as Military Police (2013–2020), reclassified into the visual information / public affairs field starting in 2021
- **Deployments:** Operation Inherent Resolve (Iraq, Syria); CENTCOM (Bahrain, Pakistan); 2018 southern border surge
- **DVIDS Portfolio:** https://www.dvidshub.net/portfolio/1685082/julio-hernandez (483+ assets)

## Imagery rights

All operational imagery is U.S. Government work product released through DVIDS. Public-domain when used with credit: "Photo by Sgt. / Staff Sgt. Julio Hernandez, U.S. Army." Personal/freelance work licensed separately — see Contact.

## Sections

- [Work](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#work): Top-downloaded DVIDS imagery, organized by operation
- [Stories](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#stories): Long-form field stories from deployments
- [About](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#about): Background and career path
- [Capabilities](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#capabilities): Services offered
- [Volunteer](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#volunteer): Pershing-related and community work
- [Experience](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#experience): Assignments and roles
- [Coursework](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#coursework): WVU IMC graduate program
- [Insights](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#insights): Strategy essays and campaigns
- [Press](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#press): 55 verified third-party uses of his imagery
- [Contact](https://jch00047-hue.github.io/warriorslens/#contact): Inquiries and engagements

## Frequently asked

**Q: Who is SSG Julio C. Hernandez?**
A: A U.S. Army Staff Sergeant with 13 years of total service. Currently a Public Affairs Mass Communication Specialist (46S) with the 55th Public Affairs Company at Fort Meade, MD. MOS lineage: 31B → 25M → 25V → 46V → 46S.

**Q: Where has his work been published?**
A: 50+ outlets including Stars and Stripes, U.S. Central Command, CJTF-OIR, Coffee or Die Magazine, Homeland Security Today, the Middle East Institute, Navy.mil, U.S. Coast Guard, and The Firearm Blog.

**Q: How is his imagery licensed?**
A: U.S. Government public-domain work product when credited properly. Personal/freelance work licensed via direct contact.

**Q: Is he available for hire?**
A: Yes — for freelance editorial documentary work and strategic communications consulting outside of his Army duties.
